title: corydalis bulbosa subsp. cava
intro: Corydalis bulbosa subsp. cava, also known as the corydalis or Chinese yellow horned poppy, is a perennial plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that is native to East Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits associated with corydalis include pain relief, improved sleep quality, and reduced anxiety, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations for stress and sleep disorders. Corydalis is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and can also be dried and added to herbal blends for its medicinal properties.
